title: Binder Error about a non-existent table name
description:
### What happens?

Dear DuckDB Developers,
I meet some internal error when I perform the following cases.
```sql
CREATE TABLE t0(c0 BOOL);
CREATE TABLE t2(c0 DOUBLE);
CREATE TABLE t3(c0 INT);

select * from t0 inner join ( SELECT t2.c0 AS col_0 FROM t2 HAVING t3.c0) as subQuery1 ON true;
-- Binder Error:
-- Referenced table "t3" not found!
-- Candidate tables: "t0"

select * from t0 inner join ( SELECT t2.c0 AS col_0 FROM t3, t2 HAVING t3.c0) as subQuery1 ON true;
-- Binder Error:
-- Referenced table "memory" not found!
-- Candidate tables: "t0"
```
However, the table 'memory' doesn't exist.

### To Reproduce

```sql
CREATE TABLE t0(c0 BOOL);
CREATE TABLE t2(c0 DOUBLE);
CREATE TABLE t3(c0 INT);

select * from t0 inner join ( SELECT t2.c0 AS col_0 FROM t2 HAVING t3.c0) as subQuery1 ON true;
-- Binder Error:
-- Referenced table "t3" not found!
-- Candidate tables: "t0"

select * from t0 inner join ( SELECT t2.c0 AS col_0 FROM t3, t2 HAVING t3.c0) as subQuery1 ON true;
-- Binder Error:
-- Referenced table "memory" not found!
-- Candidate tables: "t0"
```

MacOS
